title: pelargonium fragile
intro: Pelargonium fragile, also known as the 'White Saddle' or 'White Rose Geranium,' is a species of flowering plant in the family Geraniaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can be attributed to the presence of geraniol and linalool compounds. The health benefits associated with Pelargonium fragile include reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of digestive issues such as irritable bowel syndrome. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and essential oil extracts, which can be used to promote relaxation and well-being.
